title: Pan-Seared Herring with Citrusy Glaze
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring pan-seared herring with a refreshing citrusy glaze. This recipe is perfect for those looking for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the olive oil to the skillet and swirl it around.
3. Add the herring fillets to the skillet, skin side up.
4. Cook the herring for 3-4 minutes on the first side, or until the skin is crispy.
5. Flip the herring over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
6. In a small bowl, mix together the lemon juice and orange marmalade.
7. Brush the citrusy glaze over the cooked herring fillets.
8. Sprinkle the garlic powder, salt, and black pepper over the herring.
9. Serve the pan-seared herring immediately, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
